query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "ai for auto-research: roadmap & user guide" computer science
rationale: The paper focuses on control strategies for autonomous vehicles (robotics/automotive engineering), which is an off-domain application of AI compared to the user's question about "AI for Auto-Research" (automated scientific discovery and literature review generation). While both involve AI, the specific mechanism, domain, and research goals are distinct, failing the criteria for same-mechanism evidence or shared empirical population.
